description_long: This nightstand features a robust, square design with a wide, flat black top surface and a sturdy, rust-colored base. The base is constructed from what appears to be weathered steel, giving it an industrial and durable appearance suitable for outdoor or urban environments. The front and back sides include two open shelves, providing storage or display space, and a circular cutout at the bottom shelf for cable management or ventilation. The side panels are solid, with the brand 'Vulcanus' and a stylized face logo etched into the metal, adding a subtle decorative touch. The overall construction is monolithic and heavy, with clean lines and a modern aesthetic. The materials and finish suggest it is designed to withstand exposure to the elements while maintaining a sleek, functional look.
description: A modern, industrial nightstand with a black top, rust-colored steel base, open shelving, and subtle branding. Its sturdy build and weathered finish make it suitable for urban outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view showing two open shelves and a circular cutout at the bottom shelf.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid steel panel with the 'Vulcanus' logo and no shelving visible.
description_view_2: Rear view identical to the front, with open shelves and a circular cutout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the 'Vulcanus' logo, matching the other side panel.
attribute_leg_design: solid pedestal base with no distinct legs
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: against a wall or as a freestanding accent in public spaces
